form.formComment: Comes off a 61 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Kaapse Klopse carrying 55.6kg at $17. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Vaal January 29 over 1000m defeating Scorpio with 56kg at $6. Thereabouts last time but others are preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out sharply away from the crop at the 150m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months ran last of 12 at this track on March 15 over 1000m, 4 len behind Jane's Vision carrying 62kg at $17. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at Greyville All Weather on October 7 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind United Nation carrying 59kg at $26. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 53-day let-up. Last start won by 2.25 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1000m defeating Saachi One carrying 55kg at $9. The start before that 4th of 8 at Kenilworth on January 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Digby carrying 61.5kg at $7.50. Loves the trip. Great chance to win again.
